label: Shell Listing
description: Keep directory listing boundaries without flooding the prompt.

tests.name: inline sample
tests.input:
total 8
drwxr-xr-x 2 user user 4096 May 1 src
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user 10 May 1 package.json
tests.expected:
total 8
drwxr-xr-x 2 user user 4096 May 1 src
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user 10 May 1 package.json
